title: GB Schematics Module Options Schema
description: Creates a new value or class module.

name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the module?

directory.description: The directory to create the module, relative to the project source.
directory.x-prompt: Directory to create the module in (leave empty for default).

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests.

inSourceTests.description: When using Vitest, separate spec files will not be generated and instead will be included within the source files.

pascalCaseFiles.description: Use pascal case file names for class module.
pascalCaseFiles.x-prompt: Use PascalCase file names for class modules?

sourceRoot.description: The path to your project's source root
sourceRoot.x-prompt: Project source root path (leave empty for default).
